content.en:
Immeasurable heaven and earth.

Ye Tian stood there, his body constantly expanding

Ten times over!

Hundredfold!

A thousandfold!

10,000 times!

100 million times!

Trillions fold!

......

As his body expanded, Ye Tian's aura became more and more terrifying, and one punch could shatter everything.

Thundered!!!

The immeasurable heaven and earth began to tremble, as if they were about to be blown up by Ye Hao's power.

However, after all, the Infinite Heaven and Earth was a treasure land that could carry the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, so no matter how Ye Tian tried his moves here, he would not be able to burst the Infinite Heaven and Earth.

I saw Ye Tian constantly making moves, and even cooperated with the Void Touch to practice moves here.

Soon, Ye Tian returned to his normal form

"The power of this space-time supreme technique is good.Although I can continue to grow bigger, but no matter how big it becomes, the increase in combat effectiveness can only be like this, but this "seven-five-zero" gate space-time supreme skill has also increased my strength a lot, and it has enhanced my defense. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he named this space-time supreme technique a Thousand Dao True Body!

Because this space-time supreme technique is combined with the power of the Hundred Dao, it is integrated into the body in a special way, turning into this huge body, making its own strength skyrocket.

Although there is no fusion of a thousand paths, there is hope for the fusion of a thousand paths in the future, so it is not impossible to name the Thousand Paths True Body.

A thousand true bodies, at the beginning of the void, walking in nothingness.

Ye Tian now possesses these three space-time supreme skills, and his strength is definitely a powerhouse in the third level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

"Let's go to the Daoyu Tower and test our strength.

Ye Tian's heart moved, and his body escaped into the hard-to-reach Dao Domain Tower.

......

Daoyu Tower.

Ye Tian came in, but he could only stay in the Dao Domain Tower, and if he wanted to enter the Dao Domain City through the Dao Domain Tower, he couldn't do it.

The first floor of the Daoyu Tower.

Ye Tian came here, and soon an opponent was born under the condensation of the power of the Dao Domain Tower.

"The Dao Domain Tower is really magical, even the peak Legendary Realm Lord can be condensed, and even I can't see that he is not a real creature!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

When the opponent condensed his shot, the battle began.

This opponent should also be at the peak of the third level of the Legendary Realm Lord's combat power, but it is a weaker third level

Therefore, as soon as they fought, Ye Tian completely suppressed the other party.

In order to quickly hit the other party, Ye Tian cast a thousand true bodies, turning into countless times larger, and the terrifying power combined with the touch of the void to burst out with the terrifying power.

Rumble!!!

The five big purple hands that covered the heavens and the earth shattered the void where the opponent was located, directly shattering the opponent's space-time supreme body, and condensing again.

In this way, the other party's body was blown up by Ye Tian again and again.

Eventually, the opponent's body could no longer coalesce.

Ye Tian broke through the first layer!

Then, Ye Tian came to the second layer of the Dao Domain Tower, and the strength of the opponents in this layer was terrifying, between the third and fourth levels of the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

As soon as this opponent appeared, Ye Tian felt an extremely terrifying pressure.

Abrupt.

The other party has shot!

It's too fast and there's almost no time limit

Although the speed of the peak Legendary Realm Lord's attack was already very fast, the opponent's attack speed seemed to be limited at all, and there was even a kind of breaking the time limit, and before he made a move, he had already landed on Ye Tian with a punch.

What does this mean, it's like Ye Tian sensed that the other party was about to make a move, but just before he sensed it, the fist had already fallen on his body, but he didn't know it, and he was directly hit.

This is an attack that transcends time, and unless you surpass the opponent in time attainment or realm, it is difficult to dodge such an attack.

Naturally, the opponent's attack was not up to such an extent, but it was not much worse.

Boom!

Ye Tian was knocked away, and he didn't have time to react.

In an instant, Ye Tian's defense was fully opened, and he even cast a void walk, but he still couldn't dodge the opponent's attack and was hit again.

So, Ye Tian prepared to attack the other party with all his might

It's a pity that no matter how Ye Tian attacks, he can't fall on the other party's body, and even if he casts a large-scale attack, he can't hurt the other party.

Although the opponent's attack was not very exaggerated, it did not reach the fourth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

But in one time, Ye Tian will inevitably lose.

Soon, Ye Tian realized that the reason why the other party had such a means was not because the strength was too strong, but because of the relationship of will.

"The other party's will is afraid that it has stepped into the eighth-order eternal will in half a step. "

Ye Tian guessed.

When such a level of will is reached, the will can even penetrate the past and the future, so that it is enough to hit him with an attack before he can react, and even perceive his attack in advance, so as to dodge it.......

Unless Ye Tian's will also reaches such a level, or his strength has stepped into the fourth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, he can easily defeat the other party, otherwise he can't help the other party at all.

After a long time, Ye Tian chose to give up this tower at the cost of serious injury.

In the following years, Ye Tian broke through the Dao Domain Tower again and again, he knew that he couldn't break through, but being able to fight against such an opponent was also a big opportunity, and there was no such opportunity in the outside world.

He can enter the Daoyu Tower again and again, which is equivalent to finding a free sparring partner for himself, such a good opportunity, he naturally wants to seize it, and not waste such a sparring opportunity.

this day.

A replica body of Ye Tian came to Xuyang Mountain, and he was going to come and ask the white-bearded old man about the Eternal Palace.

After all, he really didn't know much about the Temple of Eternity, and was limited to the little information that Dao Domain City had told him.

Sunrise Mountain.

Ye Tian came, got the permission of the white-bearded old man, and entered Xuyang Mountain.

"I've seen the white-bearded old man!"

Ye Tian said politely.

The white-bearded old man saw Ye Tian and said with a little surprise: "Endless Lord, your strength has improved very quickly, I'm afraid that the third level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord is relatively powerful." "

Ye Tian was not surprised that his strength was seen through, and nodded slightly: "I have indeed reached the third level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, but I am still far from the realm of the white-bearded old man!"

"What are you looking for me this time 4.8?" asked the white-bearded old man.

Ye Tian's face became serious, and he asked, "Old man with white beard, do you know about the Eternal Palace?"

"Temple of Eternity!"

The white-bearded old man stared at Ye Tian in astonishment: When you entered the Dao Domain City before, you successfully comprehended a hundred Dao Monuments?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The white-bearded old man even knew about the 100 Dao Monuments, and it seemed that he must know about the Eternal Palace.

"I'm really a little surprised, I didn't expect that you haven't been practicing for a long time, and you have already mastered a hundred paths. @白须老人震惊道: "You don't know anything about the Temple of Eternity, so you want to know a little about the Temple of Eternity from me. "

Ye Tian listened carefully and listened to the old man with the white beard. _
